name: Jordan Peele
blurb: Half of Key & Peele; later an Oscar-winning filmmaker.
bio: Jordan Peele is an American comedian, actor, and filmmaker who co-created and starred in Comedy Central's Key & Peele after years on MADtv. He went on to win an Academy Award for writing the horror film Get Out.

flags.note: Added 2026-06-17 discovery pass (expanded comedy-bit scope): minimum profile = bio + headshot + one verified clip; deepen via the audit game.
